src/file_loader.rs:436-498

Coverage: 0% for load_all, load_dot_directory_files, load_local_files_managed

Uncovered lines: 439, 448-449, 451, 461, 463-465, 469-473, 476, 480-483, 487-491, 493, 497

```rust
pub fn load_all(&mut self) -> Result<()>
fn load_dot_directory_files(&mut self) -> Result<()>
fn load_local_files_managed(&mut self) -> Result<()>
```

Three load modes need testing:
1. Default managed mode (lines 448-452) — loads from XDG data + git root
2. Dot-directory mode (lines 461-476) — loads from XDG + .{subdir} at git root
3. Managed fallback to current dir (lines 487-497) — when not in git repo

All need temp directories with controlled env vars.
Add tests for VFS load_all modes (dot-dir, managed, search paths)
